generate.line: As big as a bus! (a bus!)
generate.mj_prompt: dark forest editorial photography, a huge shaggy grey Great Dane-type dog (matching big-dog-towering.png / big.png) standing beside a small vintage toy double-decker bus for scale comparison, dramatic low angle, muted green background, cinematic Montessori dark-trap aesthetic

wrong_art.issue: this single week's 'big dog' character appears as at least 4 different breeds across the story beats (wrinkly mastiff, Great-Dane-like grey dog, hound-type, scruffy terrier) - no consistent 'big dog' identity carries through the song
wrong_art.fix: pick ONE big-dog design (recommend the grey Great Dane from big-dog-towering.png/big.png, the most visually 'big') and regenerate the pig/cat/hiding/potato scenes to match it
wrong_art.mj_prompt: dark forest editorial photography, the same large grey brindle Great Dane-type dog (floppy ears, wrinkled jowls) from the towering/big shots, [scene-specific pairing with pig/kitten/hiding/potato], muted green background, cinematic Montessori dark-trap aesthetic
